monitor.title: Monitor Dashboard
monitor.noDataDescription: No data found for the current time range. Please try adjusting the filter conditions or selecting a different time range.

metrics.totalRequestsTooltip: Total number of requests in the time range
metrics.errorCountTooltip: Number of exception requests in the time range
metrics.usedAmountTooltip: Total used amount in the time range
metrics.serviceTierFlexTooltip: Requests using Flex service tier (lower priority, lower cost)
metrics.serviceTierPriorityTooltip: Requests using Priority service tier (higher priority, higher cost)
metrics.maxRpmTooltip: Maximum requests per minute in the time range
metrics.maxTpmTooltip: Maximum tokens per minute in the time range
metrics.totalTokensTooltip: Total tokens consumed in the time range
metrics.totalInputTokensTooltip: Total input-side tokens in the time range, including general, image, audio, cached, and cache creation tokens.
metrics.totalInputAmountTooltip: Total input-side cost in the time range, including general, image, audio, cached, and cache creation costs.
metrics.totalOutputTokensTooltip: Total output-side tokens in the time range, including general and image output tokens.
metrics.totalOutputAmountTooltip: Total output-side cost in the time range, including general and image output costs.
metrics.outputTokensTooltip: Total output tokens in the time range
metrics.cacheHitCountTooltip: Number of requests that hit cache in the time range
metrics.cachedTokensTooltip: Tokens served from cache in the time range
metrics.webSearchCountTooltip: Number of web searches performed in the time range

login.title: Login to Admin Panel
login.description: Please enter your access token to login
login.keepSafe: Please keep your access token safe

dialog.createDescription: Create a new API access key
dialog.name: Name

deleteDialog.confirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this API Key? This action cannot be undone.

quota.title: Quota Configuration
quota.description: Configure usage quotas for this token
quota.totalHelp: Set total usage quota, 0 means unlimited
quota.periodHelp: Set usage quota for each period
quota.periodTypeDisabledHelp: Period type is only needed when a period quota is set

builtin.title: Add Builtin Models
builtin.description: Select and import model configs bundled with the system. Existing models are hidden automatically.
builtin.noAvailableModels: No builtin models available to import

dialog.createDescription: Add a new model to the system
dialog.ownerDescription: Used only for display and search filtering. It can be empty and can contain any characters.
dialog.forceSaveDetailDescription: Always persist request details for this model, even when the default detail-saving policy would skip them.
dialog.excludeFromTestsDescription: Skip this model when running automatic channel or model connectivity tests.
dialog.maxImageGenerationCountDescription: Maximum allowed value for the image request parameter n. `0` means no limit. Only applies to image generation and image edit models.
dialog.requestBodyStorageMaxSizePlaceholder: Enter 0 to use the global default, or a negative number to disable storage
dialog.requestBodyStorageMaxSizeDescription: Maximum stored size for request body details. `0` uses the global default value. A negative number means the request body detail will not be stored.
dialog.responseBodyStorageMaxSizePlaceholder: Enter 0 to use the global default, or a negative number to disable storage
dialog.responseBodyStorageMaxSizeDescription: Maximum stored size for response body details. `0` uses the global default value. A negative number means the response body detail will not be stored.
dialog.recordServiceTierDescription: Track service tier breakdown in summary data for this model, such as flex and priority.
dialog.recordClaudeLongContextDescription: Track an extra summary bucket only when the model is Claude and input tokens are greater than 200,000.
dialog.disableResolutionFuzzyMatchDescription: Require conditional prices to match resolution exactly. When disabled, common size formats can fall back to normalized resolution tiers.
dialog.modelNameUpdateDisabled: Model name cannot be modified in update mode

config.title: Model Display Config
config.description: Configure descriptive display fields for the model
config.note: This section is for frontend display and notes only. It does not affect actual model behavior.
config.toolChoiceDescription: Display-only flag indicating whether this model supports tool choice.
config.visionDescription: Display-only flag indicating whether this model supports image or vision input.
config.coderDescription: Display-only flag indicating whether this model is oriented toward coding use cases.
config.limitedTimeFreeDescription: Display-only flag indicating whether this model is currently free in a promotion.
config.supportFormatsPlaceholder: One format per line, for example mp3
config.supportFormatsDescription: Enter one supported format per line. Useful for speech or audio model display.
config.supportVoicesPlaceholder: One voice per line, for example zh_female_cancan_mars_bigtts
config.supportVoicesDescription: Enter one supported voice per line. Useful for TTS model display.
config.extrasJsonPlaceholder: Enter a JSON object for extra display fields, for example {"custom_tag": true}
config.extrasJsonDescription: Use this to preserve or add config fields that do not have dedicated controls above. Must be a JSON object.
config.extrasJsonInvalid: Extra display fields JSON is invalid
config.extrasJsonObjectError: Extra display fields must be a JSON object
config.allowedResolutionsPlaceholder: One value per line, for example 1024x1024, 1k, 720p, or 1280x720
config.allowedResolutionsDescription: Exact matches are checked first, then common equivalent image size or video resolution formats are matched. Aspect ratios are not used as resolution limits.

dialog.noSearchEngineConfigured: Click "Add Search Engine" to configure search engines
dialog.pluginConfigurationDescription: Configure optional plugins for this model

cachePlugin.title: Cache Plugin
cachePlugin.description: Enable response caching to improve performance

cacheFollowPlugin.title: Cache Follow Plugin
cacheFollowPlugin.description: Supports prompt_cache_key-based targeted channel follow and user-scoped cache-follow by default, helping improve upstream cache hit rate. Generic cache-follow can be enabled explicitly when needed. Disabled by default.
cacheFollowPlugin.enableGenericFollowDescription: Enables generic cache-follow for the group + token + model scope when no prompt_cache_key or user-scoped mapping is available. Recommended when each user or tenant has an isolated group/token. Do not enable it when many users share the same group/token or a global admin key, otherwise requests in that shared scope may converge on one remembered channel and reduce load balancing.
cacheFollowPlugin.followedChannelTTLSecondsPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the default value 180
cacheFollowPlugin.followedChannelTTLSecondsDescription: Controls how long a remembered cache-effective channel stays valid. It always applies to user-scoped entries, applies to generic entries only when generic follow is enabled, and also applies to prompt_cache_key entries when the upstream does not return a more specific retention.
cacheFollowPlugin.recentChannelUpdateDebounceSecondsPlaceh: Leave empty to use the default value 30
cacheFollowPlugin.recentChannelUpdateDebounceSecondsDescri: Controls the minimum refresh interval for the recent channel mapping in the same scope, reducing noisy recent writes while still following upstream routing changes.

webSearchPlugin.title: Web Search Plugin
webSearchPlugin.description: Enable web search capabilities for enhanced responses

engineSpec.baseUrlOptionalHelp: When left empty, the provider's default URL will be used

thinkSplitPlugin.title: Think Split Plugin
thinkSplitPlugin.description: Split complex thinking into structured responses

streamFakePlugin.title: Stream Fake Plugin
streamFakePlugin.description: Convert non-streaming requests to streaming responses for better user experience

dialog.maxVideoGenerationSecondsDescription: Maximum allowed value for video request seconds. `0` means no limit. Applies to video generation and remix models.
dialog.maxVideoGenerationCountDescription: Maximum allowed value for video count. `0` means no limit. Applies to OpenAI video job variants and Gemini native numberOfVideos.

export.globalDescription: Generate a CSV file for global logs using the time range, filters, and export options you choose.
export.groupDescription: Generate a CSV file for the current group and control options such as whether the channel column is included.
export.keywordNotice: The current keyword search is not supported by the export API. Use the explicit filters below instead.

sections.timeDescription: Set the export time range, timezone, and server-side chunk size.
sections.filtersDescription: These values are sent directly to the log export API to narrow the export scope.
sections.optionsDescription: Control detail payloads, entry limits, and the group-only channel column.

hints.includeDetail: Include request and response payload details. This can make the CSV much larger.
hints.includeChannel: Only available for group exports. Writes the channel ID as a separate CSV column.
hints.includeRetryAt: Only available for group exports. retry_at is excluded by default.
hints.limitEntries: When disabled, the request is sent as unlimited and the export follows only the selected time range.

validation.chunkInterval: Read interval must be a duration between 10m and 4h, for example 30m or 1h
validation.statusCode: Status code must be an integer
validation.channel: Channel ID must be an integer
validation.maxEntries: Max entries must be a positive integer

apiDoc.responseFormatValues: The audio output supports for the following formats:

channel.name: Name
channel.deleted: Channel has been deleted or does not exist
channel.temporarilyExcludedHelp: Excluded routes are re-tested automatically. Once the model becomes available again, it will be removed from this list.
channel.highErrorRateExcluded: Temporarily excluded due to no permission or high error rate
channel.importSuccess: {{success}} channels imported successfully{{fail, select, 0{} other{, {{fail}} failed}}}

dialog.createDescription: Add a new channel to the system
dialog.name: Custom Name
dialog.configsPlaceholder: Enter a JSON object, for example {"region":"cn-beijing"}
dialog.configsHelp: Only JSON object format is supported. Create, update, preview test, import, and export all use this content.
dialog.configsJsonObjectError: Channel config must be a JSON object

configEditor.sharedDataHelp: Visual mode and JSON mode edit the same underlying config data. Unsupported keys are preserved.

dialog.baseUrlOptionalHelp: When left empty, the provider's default URL will be used
dialog.proxyUrlPlaceholder: Enter proxy URL, for example http://127.0.0.1:7890 or socks5://127.0.0.1:1080
dialog.proxyUrlHelp: Optional. Supports HTTP, HTTPS, and SOCKS5 proxies.
dialog.setsPlaceholder: Enter group name and press enter to add
dialog.priorityHelp: Higher value means higher priority. Effective priority is dynamically adjusted by error rate. Default is 10
dialog.skipTlsVerifyHelp: Enable this only when you trust the upstream service and need to bypass certificate verification.
dialog.enabledNoPermissionBanHelp: When the upstream returns a no-permission status, the channel-model route will be temporarily excluded immediately.
dialog.warnErrorRatePlaceholder: Leave empty to use the default warning threshold
dialog.warnErrorRateHelp: Triggers warning state when recent error rate reaches this threshold. Leave empty to use the system default.
dialog.maxErrorRatePlaceholder: Leave empty to disable temporary exclusion
dialog.maxErrorRateHelp: When recent error rate reaches this threshold, the channel-model route will be temporarily excluded. Leave empty to disable.
dialog.defaultModelsHint: Default models from channel type config. Switch to custom to override.
dialog.defaultModelsEmpty: No default models are configured for this provider yet.
dialog.defaultModelsManageHint: You can configure default models for this provider first, and they will appear here immediately after saving.
dialog.switchToCustomConfirm: Switching to custom will pre-fill with defaults for editing.

defaultModels.description: Configure default models for each channel type, auto-applied when creating channels
defaultModels.empty: No default models configured for any channel type yet

modelConfig.addDescription: Add a model-specific configuration override for this group
modelConfig.copyDescription: Create a new model config based on existing one
modelConfig.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the config for model "{{model}}"? This action cannot be undone.
modelConfig.overrideLimitDesc: Override the global RPM/TPM limits for this model
modelConfig.overrideRetryTimesDesc: Override the global retry times for this model
modelConfig.overrideTimeoutConfigDesc: Override the request and stream timeout settings for this model
modelConfig.overrideForceSaveDetailDesc: Override the force save detail setting for this model
modelConfig.overrideMaxImageGenerationCountDesc: Override the maximum allowed image count for image generation or edit requests
modelConfig.maxImageGenerationCountHint: `0` means no limit. Applies to the request parameter `n`.
modelConfig.overrideRequestBodyStorageMaxSize: Override Request Body Storage Max Size
modelConfig.overrideRequestBodyStorageMaxSizeDesc: Override the maximum stored size for request body details for this model
modelConfig.overrideResponseBodyStorageMaxSize: Override Response Body Storage Max Size
modelConfig.overrideResponseBodyStorageMaxSizeDesc: Override the maximum stored size for response body details for this model
modelConfig.storageMaxSizeHint: `0` uses the global default value. A negative number means the corresponding detail will not be stored.
modelConfig.overrideRecordServiceTierDesc: Override whether service tier is recorded for this model
modelConfig.overrideRecordClaudeLongContextDesc: Override whether Claude long context summary is recorded for this model
modelConfig.overridePriceDesc: Override the global pricing for this model
modelConfig.deleted: Model has been deleted or does not exist
modelConfig.overrideMaxVideoGenerationSecondsDesc: Override the maximum allowed video duration for video generation or remix requests
modelConfig.maxVideoGenerationSecondsHint: `0` means no limit. Applies to the request parameter `seconds` or legacy `n_seconds`.
modelConfig.overrideMaxVideoGenerationCountDesc: Override the maximum allowed generated video count for video requests
modelConfig.maxVideoGenerationCountHint: `0` means no limit. Applies to OpenAI `n_variants` and Gemini native `numberOfVideos`.
